Responsibilities: Thermal & Pneumatic Infrastructure Management
- Manage and execute preventive maintenance (PM) and diagnostic testing for high-capacity thermal assets (e.g., Centrifugal Chillers, Hot Water Generators, Screw Compressors, and AHUs).
- Act as the first responder for mechanical faults, refrigerant leaks, or pressure drops to minimize production downtime and maintain facility climate stability.
- Maintain rigorous maintenance logs and update equipment history, including runtime hours and oil/refrigerant analysis, within the CMMS or ERP.

System Reliability & Operational Integrity
- Monitor system performance parameters (approach temperatures, refrigerant pressures, dew points, and Delta T) and take corrective actions when deviations occur.
- Oversee the accuracy of environmental data, ensuring air change rates, humidity levels, and room pressures meet defined cleanroom or production standards.
- Lead Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for HVAC failures or steam/air quality excursions and implement Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA).

Infrastructure Projects & System Commissioning
- Plan and execute utility projects, such as the installation of Variable Frequency Drives (VFDs), upgrading BMS (Building Management System) controllers, or commissioning new HWG units.
- Coordinate with OEMs, HVAC contractors, and specialized inspectors for boiler certifications, refrigerant recovery, and balancing of air/water systems.
- Ensure all thermal projects are completed within budget, meet ASHRAE/mechanical codes, and align with energy efficiency benchmarks.

Consumables & Critical Spares Management
- Track inventory for critical spares (filters, belts, actuators, gaskets), specialized lubricants, and refrigerants to avoid operational delays.
- Ensure proper storage and handling of hazardous materials, including pressurized gas cylinders, water treatment chemicals for cooling towers, and fuel for generators.

Safety, Environmental & Regulatory Compliance
- Enforce strict adherence to OSHA, EPA (Refrigerant Management), and local pressure vessel regulations during all operational activities.
- Lead safety protocols, including Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) for high-pressure systems, chemical handling safety, and the management of Safety Data Sheets (SDS).
- Serve as the primary technical point of contact for environmental audits or energy inspections by providing emission logs, refrigerant tracking, and compliance documentation.

Technical Leadership & Coordination
- Coordinate with Production and QA/QC to prioritize cooling/heating loads and compressed air supply based on manufacturing schedules.
- Mentor and train Junior Operators on psychrometric charts, BMS interface navigation, and safe boiler start-up/shutdown procedures to ensure team competency.

Requirements: A. KNOWLEDGE System Operations •    Thermal & Pneumatic Infrastructure: Deep understanding of industrial chiller cycles, hot water generators (HWG), air compressors (screw/centrifugal), and com

আমরা আমাদের টিমে EGP Tender Manage করার জন্য একজন দক্ষ ব্যক্তি নিয়োগ দিতে চাই। দায়িত্বসমূহ: • EGP portal এ tender search করা • Tender preparation ও submission করা • প্রয়োজনীয় document ready করা • Tender related follow-up ও communication maintain করা যোগ্যতা: • EGP portal এ কাজের বাস্তব অভিজ্ঞতা থাকতে হবে • Tender process সম্পর্কে ভালো ধারণা থাকতে হবে • Computer ও internet ব্যবহারে দক্ষ হতে হবে আগ্রহীরা ইনবক্সে CV পাঠাতে পারেন অথবা যোগাযোগ করুন।

Responsibilities: Engineering Inventory & Parts Management
- Execute the receipt, inspection, and systematic storage of engineering spare parts, tools, and consumables (bearings, seals, electrical components, etc.).
- Operate the ERP/SAP system to perform real-time transactions for stock issuance, returns, and receipts to ensure inventory accuracy.
- Monitor "Min-Max" stock levels and lead times to trigger purchase requisitions, preventing operational downtime due to missing critical spares.

Stock Integrity & Audit Compliance
- Ensure 100% stock traceability by accurately recording serial numbers, batch numbers, and shelf-life for sensitive components (lubricants, gaskets, electronic sensors).
- Perform regular cycle counts and wall-to-wall physical audits to identify variances and report discrepancies to the Engineering Lead.
- Ensure strict adherence to binning and labeling standards, ensuring every item is stored in its designated location for rapid retrieval during breakdowns.

Store Handling & First-Line Maintenance
- Conduct routine inspections of storage conditions (temperature, humidity, dust control) to prevent corrosion or degradation of high-value technical assets.
- Support the upkeep of the engineering store area by implementing 5S principles, ensuring all aisles, shelves, and heavy-part racks are safe and accessible.
- Respond to urgent part requests during emergency breakdowns and coordinate with the procurement team for local sourcing or expedited deliveries.

Safety & Material Handling
- Ensure the safe handling of heavy engineering components (motors, pumps) and hazardous materials (industrial oils, degreasers), maintaining PPE and spill kit compliance.
- Maintain storage discipline for specialized tools and "Critical Spares," ensuring they are preserved in ready-to-use condition.
- Support safe lifting and material movement within the store using manual or mechanical handling equipment to prevent accidents and damage to parts.

Requirements: A. KNOWLEDGE Technical Inventory Management •    Strong understanding of Engineering Spare Parts (Mechanical, Electrical, Electronics, and Plumbing) and their categorization. •    Knowledge of Inventory Flow: Receiving, Inspection (GRN), Binning, Issuance, and Returns. •    Understanding of storage principles, including specialized storage for sensitive electronics, rubber gaskets (shelf-life), and lubricants. System & Process Control •    Working knowledge of ERP/SAP (MM Module) for inventory tracking, stock adjustments, and purchase requisitions. •    Awareness of "Min-Max" levels, Lead Time, and Safety Stock concepts to prevent stock-outs during critical breakdowns. Compliance & Documentation •    Knowledge of Asset Management and documentation requirements: Spare parts traceability, Gate Pass management, and Warranty tracking. •    Understanding of 5S and Safety standards within a warehouse environment to maintain a hazard-free workspace. B. SKILLS & ABILITIES Operational & Technical •

Responsibilities: Utility Operations & Monitoring
- Operate, monitor, and ensure stable functioning of all utility equipment and distribution systems (Chiller, Compressor, AHU, HWG/Boiler, WTP/RO, Cooling Tower, DG, and electrical distribution where applicable).
- Maintain utility performance within defined operating ranges, ensuring timely response to abnormal readings or alarms.
- Conduct routine checks on pressure, flow, temperature, humidity, water quality parameters, electrical load, vibration, and system efficiency indicators.

Preventive Maintenance (PM) Execution
- Perform planned preventive maintenance as per schedule and OEM guidelines for all utilities and supporting systems.
- Carry out inspections, lubrication, filter cleaning/replacement, belt and coupling checks, valve checks, leak checks, and alignment tasks.
- Maintain PM documentation, checklists, and service history updates in CMMS/ERP/SAP.

Corrective Maintenance & Troubleshooting (C&S)
- Attend breakdown calls and troubleshoot mechanical, electrical, pneumatic, and basic instrumentation faults in utility systems.
- Diagnose and rectify issues such as compressor pressure loss, chiller trips, AHU malfunction, boiler/HWG safety alarm, water quality deviations, pump failure, electrical faults, and leakage.
- Coordinate with production and engineering teams to ensure safe isolation, restoration, and validation of utilities after repairs.

Continuous Optimization (CO) & Energy Efficiency
- Support energy optimization initiatives by improving compressor efficiency, reducing air leaks, optimizing chiller load, improving AHU performance, and minimizing water/steam losses.
- Monitor utility consumption trends and assist in identifying opportunities for energy saving, performance improvement, and sustainability compliance.
- Support root cause analysis of repeated failures and contribute to reliability improvement (MTBF, downtime reduction).

Safety, Compliance & Documentation
- Ensure strict compliance with electrical and mechanical safety, LOTO, pressure vessel safety, boiler safety, and safe handling of chemicals and utilities.
- Ensure compliance with regulatory and audit requirements related to utilities (water quality, equipment certification, safety inspection records).
- Maintain documentation of utility readings, maintenance logs, calibration records (where applicable), and compliance reports.

Requirements: A. KNOWLEDGE Utility Systems Knowledge •    Strong understanding of Chillers, cooling towers, and HVAC/AHU systems. •    Knowledge of Compressed Air Systems. •    Knowledge of HWG systems, steam distribution, condensate systems, safety interlocks, and basics. •    Knowledge of WTP/RO/Softener/systems, water quality parameters, dosing systems, filtration, and supply requirements. Monitoring & Compliance •    Understanding of key monitoring parameters: temperature, pressure, flow, humidity, water quality (TDS, hardness, pH), compressor dew point, safety limits. •    Basic kno

Responsibilities: Tube Filling & Sealing Operations - Operate tube filling and sealing machines to meet output targets while ensuring dosing accuracy and seal integrity.
- Monitor key parameters (fill volume/weight, sealing temperature, crimp depth, coding alignment) and ensure compliance.
- Ensure correct loading of empty tubes, caps, and printed components to avoid misprints or wrong pack mix-ups. Quality, Hygiene & GMP Compliance - Perform routine in-process checks for fill weight variation, leakage, sealing defects, and print/code readability.
- Maintain strict hygiene standards in tube handling, product exposure areas, and cleaning procedures.
- Ensure proper documentation of production records, rejects, and deviations as per BPR and SOP requirements. Troubleshooting & First-Line Maintenance - Identify and respond to common issues (tube misalignment, leakage, sealing failure, dosing variation) to reduce downtime.
- Conduct routine cleaning, lubrication, and minor adjustments to ensure consistent machine performance.
- Coordinate with maintenance during breakdowns and assist in restoration of operation safely. Safety & Performance Improvement - Ensure safe operation under machine guarding requirements and comply with LOTO procedures during adjustments.
- Support waste reduction initiatives by controlling reject rates and minimizing product spillage.
- Assist supervisors in continuous improvement initiatives to optimize OEE and line performance.

Requirements: A. KNOWLEDGE Filling & Sealing Operations • Knowledge of tube filling, dosing, sealing, crimping, cap application, and coding operations. • Understanding of key quality parameters: fill weight accuracy, seal integrity, leakage prevention, and coding compliance. Quality & GMP • Knowledge of GMP, line clearance procedures, hygiene discipline, and contamination prevention in filling areas. • Awareness of defect types: under/over-fill, sealing defect, tube deformation, leakage, coding mismatch. Machine Cleaning & Maintenance • Understanding of cleaning schedules and autonomous maintenance concepts for tube filling machines. • Basic awareness of safety requirements during machine operation and minor interventions. Documentation & Reporting • Understanding of machine logbooks, RM consumption recording, WIP reporting, and rejection recording requirements. B. SKILLS & ABILITIES Machine Operation & Troubleshooting • Strong ability to ensure smooth operation of tube filling machines and maintain stable output. • Skilled in handling machine adjustments and basic troubleshooting (tube misfeed, nozzle blockage, sealing failure, coding issues). • Capability to perform efficient SKU changeovers and restore line quickly after minor stoppages. Quality Delivery • Ability to perform routine quality checks and ensure finished tubes meet set standards. • Strong defect detection skill and ability to take corrective action before quality loss escalates. Responsibilities: Cartoner & Bundler Operations • Operate and monitor cartoner and bundler machines to ensure continuous packaging flow and minimal downtime.
• Ensure correct feeding of cartons, inserts, and bundles to avoid mispacks, incorrect bundling, or customer complaints.
• Verify pack counts, sealing quality, shrink integrity (if applicable), and bundling alignment. Quality & Compliance Assurance • Ensure correct coding, barcoding, labeling, and traceability compliance on secondary packs.
• Conduct routine checks for carton defects, missing items, incorrect quantity, or improper sealing and escalate deviations.
• Support QA/QC inspections and ensure rejection handling as per quality procedures. Line Efficiency & Changeover Management • Perform changeovers, adjustments, and machine settings to support different SKUs with minimal downtime.
• Identify causes of frequent jams, misfeeds, and breakdown patterns and report for corrective action.
• Maintain smooth coordination with upstream (tube/carton feeding) and downstream (case packing/dispatch) operations. Safety & Housekeeping • Ensure strict compliance with line safety standards, guarding protocols, and LOTO procedures during minor interventions.
• Maintain 5S and hygiene practices to ensure clean, organized packaging areas.
• Handle packaging materials responsibly to reduce damage and wastage

Quality & Standards •    Knowledge of packaging quality standards for correct packing, proper sealing, coding readability, and bundle integrity. •    Awareness of common packaging defects (mispack, wrong count, damaged packs, incorrect coding). Documentation & Reporting •    Understanding of log maintenance, RM usage tracking, and WIP reporting procedures. B. Quality Delivery •    Strong inspection ability to detect defects early and ensure delivery of finished products as per set standard. •    Ability to segregate rejects and support compliance with QA/QC controls. ডিপার্টমেন্টাল সেলস টার্গেট অর্জনের লক্ষে সুপারভাইজরকে পরিপূর্ণ সহায়ত করতে হবে। গ্রাহকের সঙ্গে যোগাযোগের মাধ্যমে গ্রাহকদের পরিপূণ সেবা প্রদান করতে হবে। গ্রাহক সেবা প্রদানের মাধ্যমে সর্বোচ্চ স্তরের গ্রাহক সন্তুষ্টি নিশ্চিত করতে হবে। প্লানোগ্রাম অনুসারে পণ্যদ্রব্য সাজানো এবং প্রদর্শন করতে হবে। ষ্টান্ডার্ড অপারেটিং প্রসিডিউর অনুযায়ী সঠিক প্যাকেজিং ও ডেলিভারী করতে হবে। কর্মক্ষেত্রে পরিষ্কার পরিচ্ছন্নতা সংক্রান্ত নিয়ম বিধি মেনে চলতে হবে। লাইন ম্যনেজার কর্তৃক নির্দেশিত পথে কিউ. এম. এস. নিয়ম বিধি মেনে চলতে হবে। নিয়মিত পণ্যের মেয়াদোত্তির্ণের তারিখ পরীক্ষা করা এবং লাইন ম্যনেজারকে তা রিপোর্ট করতে হবে। শেলফ, অন্যান্য ওয়ার্কস্টেশন এবং গ্রাহক সেবার স্থানসমূহ পরিষ্কার-পরিছন্ন এবং স্বাস্থসম্মত রাখতে হবে। ওয়্যারহাউস এবং সাপ্লায়ারের থেকে পণ্যদ্রব্য গ্রহণে সহায়তা, লোডিং, আনলোডিং এবং সেলভ পর্যন্ত নিতে হবে।

Responsibilities: Sub-Station & Utility Infrastructure Management - Manage and execute preventive maintenance (PM) and diagnostic testing for high-voltage assets (e.g., Transformers, Switchgear, Circuit Breakers, and Protective Relays).
- Act as the first responder for electrical faults, power quality issues, or sub-station alarms to minimize facility downtime and ensure grid stability.
- Maintain rigorous maintenance logs and update equipment history within the CMMS (Computerized Maintenance Management System) or ERP. System Reliability & Operational Integrity - Monitor system performance parameters (voltage stability, power factor, hydraulic pressure, and flow rates) and take immediate corrective action when deviations occur.
- Oversee the accuracy of water quality data, ensuring all filtration and treatment processes meet defined purity, pH, and conductivity standards.
- Lead Root Cause Analysis (RCA) for utility interruptions or water quality excursions and implement Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA). Infrastructure Projects & System Commissioning - Plan and execute utility projects, such as the integration of SCADA upgrades, commissioning of new water pumps, or the validation of secondary power sources.
- Coordinate with OEMs, utility providers, and specialized contractors for technical installations, transformer oil testing, and high-voltage servicing.
- Ensure all utility projects are completed within budget, meet engineering safety standards, and align with local electrical codes and environmental regulations. Consumables & Critical Spares Management - Track inventory for critical spares (fuses, contactors, seals), water treatment chemicals, and filtration media, requesting replenishment to avoid operational delays.
- Ensure proper storage and handling of hazardous chemicals (e.g., chlorine, acids) and specialized high-voltage safety gear (hot sticks, arc-flash suits). Safety, Environmental & Regulatory Compliance - Enforce strict adherence to OSHA, NFPA 70E (Electrical Safety), and environmental water discharge standards during all operational activities.
- Lead safety protocols, including Lockout/Tagout (LOTO), confined space entry permits, and the management of Safety Data Sheets (SDS) for water treatment.
- Serve as the primary technical point of contact for regulatory inspections or utility audits by providing maintenance logs, water quality reports, and compliance documentation. Technical Leadership & Coordination - Coordinate with Production and Facility Management to prioritize utility loads and water supply based on plant demand and peak hours.
- Mentor and train Junior Operators on complex switching procedures, SCADA interfaces, and water chemistry protocols to ensure team competency.

job_description:
Responsibilities: Dominos Pizza - Saudi Arabia is hiring for the position of restaurant worker! Benefits: 🔹 Salary: 800 Riyal + 200 Food + OT 🔹 Accommodation: Provided by the company 🔹 Working hours: 8 hours per day, 6 days a week; (1 day off) 🔹 Regular incentives, bonuses, and overtime benefits 🔹 Other benefits: Eikama, transportation, and medical facilities provided by the company. 📌 Eligibility: (Please read carefully before applying) ======================================== ✔ Age: 21 - 35 years. Candidates outside this age range will not be called for an interview. ✔ English: Proficiency in speaking and writing English is necessary. ✔ Passport: All candidates must bring both new and old passports for the interview. The passport must be valid for a minimum of 1.5 years. Candidates without a passport should not apply. ✔ Height: Minimum height requirement is 5 feet or above. ✔ Physical condition and hygiene: Candidates with visible dental issues, pimples, skin problems, or tattoos will not be considered. Clean shaven appearance is mandatory. ✔ Minimum educational qualification: Minimum SSC or equivalent pass certificate is required. ✔ Dress code: Candidates must wear formal attire - white shirt, black pants, and black shoes for the interview. ✔ Clean shave: Candidates must have a clean shave. Those unwilling to shave should not apply. ✔ Personality and appearance: Candidates must be smart, attractive, and presentable. ✔ Previous experience: Candidates who are blacklisted in KSA (Saudi Arabia) will not be eligible for this recruitment. ✔ Interview method: The interview will be conducted in person, not online. 📆 Pre-selection interview: April 2026 (Dhaka) 📆 Delegate interview: Last week of April 2026 (Dhaka) Additional Information: 1. Visa validity: 2 years - non-renewable 2. Job location: Any branch of Dominos Pizza in Saudi Arabia, i.e., any location. 3. Probation period: 3 months from the date of joining. 4. Payment terms: Payment will be made after obtaining the visa.

সৌদি আরবে ডোমিনোস পিৎজা ( DOMINOS PIZZA – Saudi Arabia) এ রেস্টুরেন্ট ওয়ার্কার পদে নিয়োগ চলছে! সুবিধাসমূহ: 🔹 বেতন: ৮০০ রিয়াল+ ২০০ খাবার +ওটি 🔹 থাকার ব্যবস্থা: কোম্পানি দেবে 🔹 কর্মঘণ্টা: দিনে ৮ ঘণ্টা, সপ্তাহে ৬ দিন; (১ দিন ছুটি) 🔹 নিয়মিত ইনসেন্টিভ, বোনাস এবং ওভারটাইম এর সুবিধা 🔹 অন্যান্য সুবিধাঃ ইকামা, পরিবহন ও চিকিৎসা কোম্পানি বহন করবে। 📌 যোগ্যতাঃ (দয়া করে ভালো করে পড়ে এরপর জবে এপ্লাই করুন) ======================================== ✔ বয়সঃ ২১ - ৩৫বছর। এর বাহিরের বয়সের প্রার্থীদেরকে ইন্টারভিউতে ডাকা হবে না। ✔ ইংরেজিঃ ইংরেজিতে পরিষ্কার ও সাবলীলভাবে কথা বলা ও লেখার দক্ষতা আবশ্যক। ✔ পাসপোর্ট: নতুন-পুরাতন সকল পাসপোর্ট ইন্টারভিউতে সাথে নিয়ে আসতে হবে। পাসপোর্ট এর মেয়াদ নূন্যতম ১.৫ বছর থাকতে হবে। যাদের পাসপোর্ট নেই, তারা দয়া করে এপ্লাই করবেন না। ✔ উচ্চতাঃ সর্বনিম্ন ৫ ফুট  বা তার বেশি হতে হবে। ✔ শারীরিক অবস্থা ও পরিচ্ছন্নতা: দৃশ্যমান দাঁতের সমস্যা থাকলে আবেদন গ্রহণযোগ্য নয়। মুখে পিম্পল বা ত্বকের সমস্যা থাকলে অযোগ্য বিবেচিত হবেন। শরীরে ট্যাটু থাকলে অযোগ্য বিবেচিত হবেন। ✔ ন্যূনতম শিক্ষাগত য

job_description:
Responsibilities: Organization: Prayojon Janseba Limited

The organization aims to expand its business activities in every police station (sub-district) of Rajshahi Division by recruiting skilled and hardworking Accountants . Position: Accountant Number of Positions: 1 per police station in Rajshahi Division (total of 68 positions) Educational Qualifications: Must have completed Honors / Bachelor's degree (BBA / B.Com). Candidates with a background in Accounting or Finance will be given preference. Professional Skills: Must have proficiency in computer operations Especially proficient in using MS Excel and basic Accounting Software Special Requirements: Candidates must have their own Laptop It is mandatory for candidates to have their own Motorcycle for quick transportation and a valid Driving License Main Responsibilities: Accurately enter daily income-expenditure and cash memos of the respective police station Prepare monthly financial reports using own laptop Maintain proper coordination in transactions with Field Officers and Dealers Properly preserve necessary vouchers and documents Salary and Benefits: Salary: ২৫,০০০ – ৩০,০০০ Taka (negotiable) Laptop maintenance allowance Fuel and transportation allowance for Motorcycle (T/A & D/A) Festival bonus Other opportunities and benefits as per company policy Golden opportunity to work in own area Contact Information: Corporate Office: Sona Mia Lodge, Namazgad, Bogura Sadar, Bogura Mobile/WhatsApp: 01805000534, 01952000042 N.B.: Candidates must have the mentality to work at their permanent address (own police station). Prayojon Janseba Limited — We are committed to serving the people.

প্রতিষ্ঠান: প্রয়োজন জনসেবা লিমিটেড প্রতিষ্ঠানটির ব্যবসায়িক কার্যক্রম সম্প্রসারণের লক্ষ্যে রাজশাহী বিভাগের প্রতিটি থানা (উপজেলা) পর্যায়ে দক্ষ ও পরিশ্রমী হিসাবরক্ষক (Accountant) নিয়োগ দেওয়া হবে। পদের নাম: হিসাবরক্ষক (Accountant) পদ সংখ্যা: রাজশাহী বিভাগের প্রতিটি থানায় ১ জন করে (মোট ৬৮ জন) শিক্ষাগত যোগ্যতা: অনার্স / স্নাতক (BBA / B.Com) পাস। হিসাববিজ্ঞান বা ফিন্যান্স ব্যাকগ্রাউন্ডের প্রার্থীদের অগ্রাধিকার দেওয়া হবে। কারিগরি দক্ষতা: কম্পিউটার পরিচালনায় দক্ষতা থাকতে হবে বিশেষ করে MS Excel এবং বেসিক Accounting Software ব্যবহারে পারদর্শী হতে হবে বিশেষ শর্তাবলী: প্রার্থীর নিজস্ব ল্যাপটপ থাকতে হবে দ্রুত যাতায়াতের জন্য প্রার্থীর নিজস্ব মোটরসাইকেল এবং বৈধ ড্রাইভিং লাইসেন্স থাকা বাধ্যতামূলক প্রধান দায়িত্বসমূহ: সংশ্লিষ্ট থানার প্রতিদিনের আয়-ব্যয় ও ক্যাশ মেমো নির্ভুলভাবে এন্ট্রি করা নিজস্ব ল্যাপটপ ব্যবহার করে মাসিক আর্থিক প্রতিবেদন (Monthly Financial Report) প্রস্তুত করা ফিল্ড অফিসার ও ডিলারদের সাথে লেনদেনের সঠিক সমন্বয় বজায় রাখা প্রয়োজনীয় ভাউচার ও ডকুমেন্টস যথাযথভাবে সংরক্ষণ করা বেতন ও সুবিধাসমূহ: বেতন: ২৫,০০০ – ৩০,০০০ টাকা (আলোচনা সাপেক্ষে) ল্যাপটপ মেইনটেন্যান্স ভাতা মোটরসাইকেলের জ্বালানি ও যাতায়াত ভাতা (T/A & D/A) উৎসব বোনাস কোম্পানির নীতিমালা অনুযায়ী অন্যান্য সুযোগ-সুবিধা নিজ এলাকায় থেকে কাজ করার সুবর্ণ সুযোগ যোগাযোগের ঠিকানা: কর্পোরেট অফিস: সোনা মিয়া লজ, নামাজগড়, বগুড়া সদর, বগুড়া মোবাইল/হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: 01805000534, 01952000042 ব

job_description:
Responsibilities: Key Responsibilities

- Lead the development of product strategies for medical gases & gas mixes used by healthcare customers/market segments across Bangladesh.
- Drive marketing initiatives for Entonox and other medical gases to create new customers and implement growth initiatives in existing accounts or new geographic areas to maximize market penetration in Bangladesh.
- Define, develop, and maintain PSOs for medical gases (including quality, specifications, sales team training, and positioning with customers) and ensure implementation at the country level.
- Monitor competitor activities and strategies and update the HOD and sales team regularly.
- Support the HOD in prioritizing and preparing CAPEX requirements for healthcare gases.
- Assist the HOD in the development and implementation of product strategies and key customer engagement programs.
- Support the healthcare team with sales planning and achievement.

Requirements: Education & Experience The candidate should have a degree in Pharmacy, Engineering, Nursing, Biology, Biochemistry, Biomedical Science, Biomedical Engineering, or Applied Chemistry. Minimum of 3 years of experience in Sales, Marketing, Clinical Application, Business Planning, preferably in the pharmaceutical/medical device industry, industrial gases, or chemical industry. Candidates with experience in Product Management and Strategic Planning will be preferred. Knowledge of financial business models will be an added advantage.

Key Responsibilities Lead the development of product strategies for medical gases & gas mixes used by healthcare customers/market segments across Bangladesh. Drive marketing initiatives for Entonox and other medical gases to create new customers and implement growth initiatives in existing accounts or new geographic areas to maximize market penetration in Bangladesh. Define, develop, and maintain PSOs for medical gases (including quality, specifications, sales team training, and positioning with customers) and ensure implementation at the country level. Monitor competitor activities and strategies and update the HOD and sales team regularly. Support the HOD in prioritizing and preparing CAPEX requirements for healthcare gases. Assist the HOD in the development and implementation of product strategies and key customer engagement programs. Support the healthcare team with sales planning and achievement.

Responsibilities: LAMB is a well-run major mission Hospital, Community Health Development, Training and Research organization. Services cover more than 6.3 million people in North West Bangladesh.

There is a vacancy for the following contractual position under the Community Health and Development Program (CHDP).

Job Summary:
The Deputy Director/Senior Program Manager holds the MVVs of LAMB. The primary purpose of the position of Deputy Director/Senior Program Manager is to oversee delegated projects and administrative tasks and also assist CHDP Director and Project Managers to achieve the goal of CHDP portfolio defined by the LAMB through the provision of efficient, effective, and high-quality service delivery, monitoring & evaluation, and maintain a functional relationship with GOB officials, Donors, and other departments of LAMB to ensure sustainable and qualitative service. Contribute to the achievement of the overall goals of the CHDP. S/he will monitor the progress and facilitate attaining the program objectives within the level of authority. Provide leadership and support in planning, implementation, monitoring, and effective implementation of project interventions. S/he is also responsible for providing supportive supervision to designated staff and networking with GO/NGOs and donors. S/he will be responsible for creating a child-safe environment in offices, for ensuring the education of staff of the projects under CHDP regarding child and vulnerable adult protection policies, and for ensuring staff's awareness of their obligation to report any allegation, concern, suspicion, or disclosure of abuse or neglect to the proper authorities as per policy.

Essential Requirements:
Master's degree in a related field. Prefer MPH and training related to Community Health Promotion and Social Determinants of Health and Well-being. Candidates should have a minimum of 15 years of experience in an international/national development organization, with 5 years in a supervisory position.

Key Requirements:
- Proven ability to work with a wide range of international donors and effectively manage project implementation.
- Demonstrated experience in project design and proposal development.
- Strong experience in office administration and managing a team.
- Hands-on experience in finance and budget management.
- Familiar with IT and data analysis tools, including Excel, MS Access, SPSS/STATA.

Requirements: Qualified candidates are requested to apply with a cover letter along with an updated CV (mentioning two references name), all educational & experience certificates, NID and recent passport size photograph to the HR Department, LAMB, P.O. Parbatipur, Dinajpur-5250, Bangladesh; alternatively, email to hrjobs@lambproject.org; Please mention the position name on top of the envelope or with the subject line of the email.

N.B. Only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Any kind of persuasion will be considered as disqualified.
